prestazioni: Engine swap to a Hyundai-Kia Lambda II 3.8L GDI V6 (G6DJ) with forged internals (Manley H-beam connecting rods, JE forged pistons, ACL race bearings) and a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (1.05 A/R turbine housing) for 550whp on E85 fuel, paired with a Kia Motorsport 6-speed wet DCT transmission with upgraded clutch packs and a PRL Motorsports Stage 3 DCT tune.

Full custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Borla with 4-2-1 equal-length headers (304-grade stainless) and a dual-mode muffler (straight-pipe mode for track, valved for street), paired with a custom 3-inch downpipe and a Tial 44mm external wastegate for precise boost control (22 psi peak).

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Kia Carnival-specific valving) with adjustable camber plates, polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90D durometer), and a custom front sway bar (25mm hollow) by Whiteline to reduce body roll, paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rears (355mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads for endurance braking.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Kia Carnival-specific, 4-inch fender flares) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and a front splitter (dry carbon, 3K twill weave) by Seibon, paired with a custom rear diffuser (3D-printed ABS with integrated LED light bar) for aggressive stance and aero balance.

Custom 22-inch forged wheels by Work Emotion CR Kiwami (9.5J ET20 front, 11J ET30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/30/22 front, 295/25/22 rear) and a custom gold/polished finish, paired with a full de-chrome treatment (vinyl wrap in 3M Matte Military Green with satin black accents).

Full custom interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara/leather upholstery) and a custom rear lounge setup (fold-down tables, 4K touchscreen displays, and a mini-fridge by Dometic), paired with a full Alcantara headliner, custom LED ambient lighting (Philips Hue Sync), and a roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) by Custom Cages UK for structural rigidity.
